app-misc/example-ledger-like-bin.note: Example: upstream tag has a package prefix before the version.

dev-python/example-alpha-tags.note: Example: include alpha/prerelease tags when the ebuild intentionally tracks them.

app-misc/example-deb-vendor.note: Example: read package metadata from an official downloadable .deb and normalize Debian revisions when the Gentoo package uses dots.

media-video/example-url-regex-vendor.note: Example: proprietary/no-fetch vendor with a machine-readable download page or JSON endpoint.

www-client/example-nightly-bin.note: Example: live/nightly package; suppress fixed-release comparison.
